sentences.target: Im Keller habe ich keinen Empfang.

translations.de: Im Keller habe ich keinen Empfang.
translations.en: I have no reception in the basement.
translations.es: No tengo señal en el sótano.
translations.fr: Je n’ai pas de réseau au sous-sol.
translations.ru: В подвале у меня нет связи.
translations.vi: Trong tầng hầm không có sóng.
translations.nl: In de kelder heb ik geen bereik.
translations.uk: У підвалі в мене немає зв’язку.
translations.hi: तहखाने में मुझे सिग्नल नहीं मिलता।
translations.nb: Jeg har ikke dekning i kjelleren.
translations.sv: Jag har ingen täckning i källaren.
translations.da: Jeg har ikke signal i kælderen.
translations.ja: 地下では電波が入りません。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition (in + dem) introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Masculine noun in dative singular as object of 'im'; denotes the location.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); V2 position in main clause.
Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Negative determiner in accusative masculine singular modifying 'Empfang'.
Masculine noun in accusative singular as direct object; sense here: mobile phone/coverage.

sentences.target: Der Empfang im Hotel ist gleich links.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ɛmˈpfaŋ ɪm hoˈtɛl ɪst ɡlaɪ̯ç lɪŋks/

translations.de: Der Empfang im Hotel ist gleich links.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ɛmˈpfaŋ ɪm hoˈtɛl ɪst ɡlaɪ̯ç lɪŋks/
translations.en: The reception in the hotel is just to the left.
translations.es: La recepción del hotel está justo a la izquierda.
translations.fr: La réception de l’hôtel est juste à gauche.
translations.it: La reception dell’hotel è subito a sinistra.
translations.ru: Стойка регистрации в отеле сразу слева.
translations.pt: A recepção do hotel fica logo à esquerda.
translations.he: דלפק הקבלה במלון נמצא מיד משמאל.
translations.vi: Lễ tân khách sạn ở ngay bên trái.
translations.ar: الاستقبال في الفندق يقع مباشرة على اليسار.
translations.nl: De receptie in het hotel is meteen links.
translations.hu: A hotel recepciója közvetlenül balra van.
translations.hi: होटल का रिसेप्शन बिलकुल बाईं तरफ है।
translations.pl: Recepcja w hotelu jest zaraz po lewej.
translations.el: Η ρεσεψιόν του ξενοδοχείου είναι ακριβώς στα αριστερά.
translations.nb: Resepsjonen på hotellet er rett til venstre.
translations.id: Resepsi hotel ada tepat di sebelah kiri.
translations.sv: Receptionen på hotellet är precis till vänster.
translations.ro: Recepția hotelului este chiar în stânga.
translations.cs: Recepce v hotelu je hned vlevo.
translations.da: Receptionen på hotellet ligger lige til venstre.
translations.ja: ホテルのフロントはすぐ左です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner for 'Empfang'.
Masculine noun in nominative singular; subject referring to the front desk.
Contracted preposition (in + dem) introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Neuter noun in dative singular as object of 'im'; location of the front desk.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) linking subject to the predicate.
Adverb used as an intensifier meaning 'right/immediately'; modifies 'links'.
Directional adverb functioning as predicate (locative) complement: 'to the left'.

sentences.target: Ich hole die Schlüssel am Empfang.

translations.de: Ich hole die Schlüssel am Empfang.
translations.en: I'm getting the keys at reception.
translations.es: Voy a recoger las llaves en recepción.
translations.fr: Je récupère les clés à la réception.
translations.pt: Vou pegar as chaves na recepção.
translations.vi: Tôi lấy chìa khóa ở lễ tân.
translations.nl: Ik haal de sleutels bij de receptie.
translations.hu: A kulcsokat a recepción veszem át.
translations.hi: मैं चाबियाँ रिसेप्शन से ले रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Παίρνω τα κλειδιά από τη ρεσεψιόν.
translations.ja: 鍵はフロントで受け取ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); transitive, taking 'die Schlüssel' as object.
Definite article in accusative plural; determiner for 'Schlüssel'.
Plural noun in accusative as direct object of 'hole'.
Contracted preposition (an + dem) introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Masculine noun in dative singular as object of 'am'; location where the keys are fetched.

sentences.target: Der Empfang gestern war richtig herzlich.

translations.de: Der Empfang gestern war richtig herzlich.
translations.en: The reception yesterday was really warm.
translations.es: La recepción de ayer fue muy cálida.
translations.fr: La réception d’hier était vraiment chaleureuse.
translations.it: Il ricevimento di ieri è stato davvero caloroso.
translations.pt: A recepção de ontem foi muito acolhedora.
translations.he: הקבלת פנים אתמול הייתה ממש חמה.
translations.tr: Dünkü resepsiyon çok sıcak ve samimiydi.
translations.vi: Buổi tiếp đón hôm qua rất ấm áp.
translations.nl: De receptie gisteren was heel hartelijk.
translations.hu: A tegnapi fogadás nagyon szívélyes volt.
translations.hi: कल का स्वागत बहुत गर्मजोशी भरा था।
translations.el: Η χθεσινή δεξίωση ήταν πολύ θερμή.
translations.nb: Mottakelsen i går var skikkelig varm.
translations.sv: Mottagningen i går var väldigt hjärtlig.
translations.ro: Recepția de ieri a fost foarte călduroasă.
translations.da: Modtagelsen i går var rigtig hjertelig.
translations.ja: 昨日のレセプションはとても温かかったです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article in nominative masculine singular; determiner for 'Empfang'.
Masculine noun in nominative singular; subject meaning 'ceremonial welcome/event'.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; situates the event in the past day.
Copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, preterite) linking subject to the predicate.
Adverb functioning as intensifier; modifies the predicate adjective 'herzlich'.
Predicative adjective describing the subject; sense 'cordial/heartfelt'.
